notes.uuid_rules: Non-existent valid UUID v4: 00000000-0000-4000-a000-ffffffffffff. Invalid UUID: 'not-a-uuid'. NEVER use 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000999.

endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return JWT access token
Create a new document template (ADMIN only)

body.name: Test Invoice Template E12
body.description: A test template for E12 backend testing

db_verification.query: SELECT id, name, "documentType", "isActive", "isDefault", "companyId" FROM document_templates WHERE name = 'Test Invoice Template E12'

test_cases.name: Create template - minimal required fields only
Create template - with isDefault=true unsets previous default

db_verification.expected: Exactly 1 row returned with name='New Default Invoice E12' (previous default 'Standard Invoice' now isDefault=false)

test_cases.name: Create template - duplicate name for same documentType → 409
Create template - name too long (>200 chars) → 400

body.name: A very long template name that exceeds the 200 character limit. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

db_verification.expected: Row exists with isActive=false (soft-deleted, not hard-deleted)

endpoints.description: Generate preview PDF with sample data (ADMIN only)

test_cases.name: Preview template - happy path (SALES_INVOICE base template)

expected.custom_assertion: Response body starts with %PDF (valid PDF binary)
PDF is generated using version override HTML, not base template

endpoints.description: Generate a single document PDF (STAFF+ role)

test_cases.name: Generate PDF - happy path (SALES_INVOICE with stub data)

expected.custom_assertion: Response body starts with %PDF. Note: uses stub data since no real invoice records exist. X-Template-Version-Id header present (may be empty string).
Content-Disposition is attachment with a filename containing SALES_INVOICE

test_cases.name: Generate PDF - invalid recordId format (not UUID) → 400

endpoints.description: Batch generate PDFs via BullMQ (MANAGER+ role, async 202)

test_cases.name: Batch generate - happy path (MANAGER role, 3 records)

expected.custom_assertion: Returns 202 Accepted with a batchJobId string. Note: may return 503 if Redis/BullMQ queue is not initialised.
May return 503 if Redis not available

test_cases.name: Batch generate - invalid UUID in recordIds → 400

expected.custom_assertion: Array of 501 valid UUIDs exceeds the max(500) limit in the Zod schema

endpoints.description: Query batch generation job status (STAFF+ role)

test_cases.name: Batch status - happy path (query existing batch job)

expected.custom_assertion: status is one of: waiting, active, completed, failed. May return 503 if Redis not available.
STAFF can query batch status. May return 503 if Redis not available.

test_cases.name: Batch status - non-existent batch job ID → 404

expected.custom_assertion: May return 503 if Redis/BullMQ queue is not initialised
Empty param should fail validation (min(1) on batchJobId) or return 404 for route not found

test_execution_order: E12-AUTH-001 — Login admin (obtain token for all subsequent tests)
E12-TPL-LIST-001 to 009 — List templates with filters
E12-TPL-DETAIL-001 to 004 — Detail and RBAC tests
E12-TPL-UPDATE-005 to 008 — Validation and RBAC tests
E12-VER-CREATE-002 to 006 — More creates, validation, RBAC
E12-VER-UPDATE-001 to 006 — Update and RBAC tests
E12-VER-DELETE-001 to 004 — Delete and RBAC tests
E12-PREVIEW-001 to 010 — Preview various templates, RBAC
E12-GEN-001 to 008 — Generate PDFs for various types and roles
E12-GEN-009 to 015 — Validation and RBAC tests
E12-BATCH-STATUS-001 to 002 — Status query happy path
E12-BATCH-STATUS-003 to 006 — Edge cases and RBAC
E12-TPL-DELETE-002 to 004 — Edge cases and RBAC

rbac_coverage.SUPER_ADMIN_tests: Majority — used for all happy path, validation, and edge case tests
rbac_coverage.MANAGER_tests: Template CRUD denied (403), batch generate allowed, batch status
rbac_coverage.STAFF_tests: Template CRUD denied (403), document generate allowed, batch denied

known_caveats: Document generation uses stub data for all document types since no real business records (invoices, POs) exist yet — all 14 types return 200 with stub PDFs
Batch generate endpoints may return 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE if Redis/BullMQ is not running in the test environment
Template IDs are UUIDs (not CUIDs) despite CLAUDE.md spec saying cuid — this is a known code review issue (#1 from E12-1)
Batch status endpoint allows STAFF to query any batch in the company, even ones created by MANAGER — known design issue (#11 from E12-1)
recordId validated as UUID by Zod but Prisma models may use CUID IDs in future epics — known issue (#1 from E12-1)
